timeline.title: Founded
timeline.desc: Techtronix Solutions was established in New Delhi with a focused vision — to bring enterprise-grade IT consulting and managed services to organisations across India.

timeline.title: First Engagements
timeline.desc: Secured our first enterprise clients in the manufacturing and financial services sectors, delivering cloud migration and cybersecurity assessment projects.

timeline.title: Service Expansion
timeline.desc: Launched our 24×7 Managed IT Service Desk and Hybrid IT practice, expanding our service portfolio to cover the full IT lifecycle for mid-to-large enterprises.

timeline.title: PAN India Presence
timeline.desc: Established sales and support presence across major metros including Delhi, Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, and Chennai — enabling rapid on-site response nationwide.

timeline.title: Growing Portfolio
timeline.desc: Delivering end-to-end IT projects spanning data centre builds, cloud migrations, cybersecurity overhauls, and ongoing managed services for a growing enterprise client base.

values.title: Mission
values.text: To deliver scalable, secure, and innovative IT solutions that enhance business efficiency and create long-term value for every organisation we serve.

values.title: Vision
values.text: To become a trusted global leader in IT system integration — empowering organisations of every scale to thrive in a connected, digital-first world.

values.title: Our Motto
values.text: "Connecting Technology, Empowering Futures." — We measure our success not by the contracts we sign, but by the business outcomes our clients achieve.

successDNA.title: Customer-Centric Approach
successDNA.desc: Every decision starts with your business outcome, not our service catalogue.

successDNA.title: Innovation-Driven Thinking
successDNA.desc: We bring modern solutions to complex problems — not yesterday's toolkits.

successDNA.title: Integrity & Transparency
successDNA.desc: Honest timelines, honest pricing, and honest conversations when things change.

successDNA.title: Excellence in Delivery
successDNA.desc: We set high standards and hold ourselves accountable to every SLA we sign.

successDNA.title: Collaboration & Teamwork
successDNA.desc: We operate as an extension of your team, not as an external vendor.

successDNA.title: Agility & Adaptability
successDNA.desc: Flexible engagement models that evolve as your IT needs change.

successDNA.title: Sustainable Practices
successDNA.desc: We design IT systems with long-term efficiency, not just short-term gains.
